center.name: 皮庫島
center.summary: 皮庫島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Azores chaffinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Azores chaffinch inhabits all of the Azores and is one the commonest birds in the archipelago; it can be seen from sea level to the mountainous interior, including the highest areas of Pico

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Azores chaffinch inhabits all of the Azores and is one the commonest birds in the archipelago; it can be seen from sea level to the mountainous interior, including the highest areas of Pico
